title: Public Corporations (Declaration of Specified Public Corporation) Order, 2003
title_en: Public Corporations (Declaration of Specified Public Corporation) Order, 2003

provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Public Corporations (Declaration of Specified Public Corporation) Order, 2003.

The Public Corporation specified in First Schedule to this Order is with effect from the date of commencement of this Order despecified as a Public Corporation and the provisions of Public Corporations Act, 1992 shall no longer apply in respect to it.
